title: cyperus retrofractus var. dipsaciformis
intro: Cyperus retrofractus var. dipsaciformis, also known as Dipsacus cyperus or Cyperus dipsaciformis, is a plant species in the sedge family (Cyperaceae) that is native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. Its health benefits include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as a diuretic to treat urinary tract issues. Cyperus retrofractus var. dipsaciformis can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
